description_long: This sculpture is a bust of a person, modeled in a reddish-brown clay-like material and mounted on a rectangular wooden base. The figure is depicted from the chest up, with detailed facial features, short textured hair, and a collared shirt. The surface is rough and hand-modeled, with visible tool marks and an unfinished, expressive texture. The back of the bust is less detailed, with broad, rough strokes suggesting the form of the head and shoulders. The base is flat and wooden, providing stability and a slight elevation to the sculpture. The overall impression is of a lifelike, yet impressionistic, portrait rendered in clay.
description: A rough-textured clay bust of a person with short hair and a collared shirt, mounted on a wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, collared shirt, and expressive features of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ear, and the textured modeling of the hair and shirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rough, unfinished back of the head and shoulders with minimal detail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, collar, and the hand-modeled surface texture.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture appears to be photographed against a plain background.
